programs.title: Destination Flavour
programs.desc: Hosts Adam Liaw, Renee Lim and Lily Serna meet passionate growers, celebrated chefs, and local food heroes from all over the Australia. In this episode, Renee finds prime free-range pork and wild fallow deer in central western NSW, Lily has lunch with two of Brisbane's best Spanish chefs, and Adam spends a day with Turkish chef Somer Sivrioglu, whose obsession with authenticity won him first prize in the 2012 Taste of Sydney awards.

programs.title: Ainsley's Great Garden Cook Off
programs.desc: Ainsley is joined by chefs Tristan Welch and Philli Armitage-Mattin in Cambridge for a light hearted cooking contest in Wimpole Estate's stunning kitchen garden.

programs.title: Destination Flavour Singapore Bitesize
programs.desc: The best bits of Adam Liaw's travels in Singapore, as he explores its vibrant food scene.

programs.title: Kriol Kitchen
programs.sub_title: Ali & Mitch Torres: Chilli Tamarind Jinnup (Stingray) & Cockle Salad
programs.desc: Inspired by their mother's cooking, Ali and Mitch prepare two seafood dishes.

programs.title: Marcus Wareing's Kitchen Garden Tales
programs.desc: Marcus investigates unusual food flavours that he can use in cooking. From foraging for edible produce to experimenting with his smoker to make chilli butter.

programs.title: My Market Kitchen
programs.desc: Laura teams up with Chef Jack Ingram, cooking Tommy Ruffs with apple, beetroot and cucumber on the banks of the River Torrens. Mike cooks Vietnamese fish skewers in the market kitchen.
